ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic entry */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group */,
  "health_problem" INTEGER /* ID of the health problem */,
  "region" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the demographic group affected */,
  "disease_code" INTEGER /* ID of the specific disease or condition */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the percentage */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the statistic */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_disease_code FOREIGN KEY ("disease_code") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_health_problem FOREIGN KEY ("health_problem") REFERENCES health_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the region belongs to */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located on */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the region */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Health expenditure per capita in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health problem */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* Name of the health problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health problem */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the health problem */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* General prevalence rate of the health problem */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate associated with the health problem */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Common risk factors for the health problem */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Common treatment options for the health problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the education level entails */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower age bound for the education level */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper age bound for the education level */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Completion rate for the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic group */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the demographic group */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, health officer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease or condition */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Full name of the disease or condition */,
  "disease_short" TEXT /* Short code for the disease or condition */,
  "icd10_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the disease */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms of the disease */,
  "complications" TEXT /* Common complications of the disease */,
  "prevention_methods" TEXT /* Common prevention methods for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's key findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Policy recommendations based on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the report */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
